name: 2.4oz Stoneware Stoneware Espresso Cup with Saucer - Room Essentials™
description:
Impress your guests by serving coffee in this Stoneware Espresso Cup with Saucer from Room Essentials™. This pack includes a cup and a saucer accentuated by blue stripes on a white backdrop for a timeless charm. Made of stoneware, this 2.4-fluid-ounce cup is suitable for both cold and hot beverages. Plus, the set is microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
